title: マルゼンスキー、『好き』を語る

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Maruzensky is being interviewed for a
magazine article.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Next, let's talk about that signature racewear of
yours.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, this? Heehee, of course! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It's a very popular design among fans. What's
your own impression of it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's my favorite! This outfit brings out 100% of my
charming qualities.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I see. Is there anything in particular that you like
about it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... The design, the fit... There are so
many good parts to choose from!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But the best thing is the color—this fiery red!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've been attached to this color for a long time.
That's why Tata's red too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, maybe it's the other way around... I've
always wanted a car just like Tata, so maybe
that's why I love the color red.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Tata?
choice_data_list: It's the nickname of Maruzensky's car.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. I got a bit excited and forgot to
mention. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: When I was younger, I was taken to a car show...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
There was a bright red supercar there, and it was
so cool, I instantly fell head over heels!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I vowed to myself then and there that when I
finally got my own car, it would definitely be that
one.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
After that, I kept looking at the pictures in
catalogs, dreaming of the day I could get my
driver's license.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that dream has come true, and I'm all smiles
when I get a chance to hit the streets! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
So, you still have the same deep feelings for this
car that you did back then?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And that's why I hope I can cheer up
the audience with my running, just like how Tata
cheers me up.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I want to give everyone the same fabulous feeling
of a hot rod! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The interview proceeds very well.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. Now, can we take a few
pictures?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey, artichokey! I'll show off my best
looks!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Of all the people I know, you must
know me best, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Of all the people I know, you must know me
best, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What should I show off in today's shoot?
choice_data_list: Speed that no one can match.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I see... I shine the most when I'm enjoying myself
during a run, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: What should we do? Can we use the racetrack?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we go right now? You reporters can
ride with us and enjoy the speed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Erm, do you mean to say you'll be driving us?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! I just can't get enough of Tata's speed!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Um, isn't this a bit too fast?! Ah! Ahh! AHHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression as she drives at top speed with the
cowering reporters in tow really is the brightest...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My smile? Well, like I always say, the most
important part is having fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No doubt! I'll give you a smile that'll knock your
socks off!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No doubt! I'll give you a smile that'll knock your
socks off!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's me, the one and only Hot Rod! Cheeeese! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: I love it! What a great expression!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, Maruzensky and I check out the article.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This picture really makes my smile look radiant!
I'm not half bad, if I do say so myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, look here! They mentioned you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, look here! They mentioned you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It says my beautiful smile must be due to the
trusting relationship I have with my trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest. The reason I smile so much is
because you support me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest. The reason I smile so much is
because you support me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's smile now is just as dazzling as the
one in the picture.
